name: kbd-group
visual_summary: kbd-group is a container component designed to group keyboard shortcuts together, often used in documentation or help pages where users need to learn a set of keyboard commands. It typically consists of a horizontally aligned list of key combinations, making it easy for users to scan and understand the shortcuts. This component is particularly useful in interactive guides, tutorials, or user manuals.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Description: kbd-group is a container component designed to group keyboard shortcuts together, often used in documentation or help pages where users need to learn a set of keyboard commands. It typically consists of a horizontally aligned list of key combinations, making it easy for users to scan and understand the shortcuts. Style: e.g. light, e.g. neutral, dark
Interactions: e.g. click-to-copy, hover, draggable
